title: Validate restarted-daemon publication SHA
goal: Validate the PUB-01A bootstrap exception with a fresh daemon process: after the fixed binary is installed and restarted, a successful run must advertise a final_sha that is the integration branch tip containing implementation evidence, closed slice metadata, and committed run reports.
acceptance: The worker makes only an evidence-note change in docs/design/evidence/pub-01a-bootstrap-exception-2026-07-06.md; no product code changes are made by this validation slice.
The existing regression test final_sha_advertises_publication_commit_with_close_records passes under slice verification and the full integration gate.
After daemon finalization, operator review verifies handoff final_sha, final-report final_sha, and implementation-summary final_sha all equal git rev-parse of the run's integration branch.
At the advertised final_sha, git show can read .workflow/slices/PUB-01B.json with status=closed and closed_by_run equal to the validation run id.
At the advertised final_sha, git show can read the validation run's committed .workflow/reports/<run>-final-report.json and .workflow/reports/<run>-implementation-summary.json artifacts.
must_ask_if: The worker would change product code, publication code, daemon lifecycle code, or tests instead of keeping this as validation evidence.
The final_sha regression test is missing or fails before daemon finalization.
The validation cannot be performed with a restarted installed daemon.
A separate publication_sha field appears necessary to make the acceptance true.
